reviews.review_description:
1- the game is realy fun

2• the admins are realy nice

3• the comunity is nice and Helpful

3• its in the curent gtag update 

4• u get Unlimited shiny rock enough 
to buy the entire Store

5• ￼and updates in the same day as gorila tag

Five resons

Better than gorilla tag, I’ve never seen a cheater, never seen a person that said any racial slurs, never saw a person who hasn’t broke A SINGLE RULE. I LOVE THIS GAME, I PLAY IT EVERYDAY NONSTOP, THIS GAME IS JUST TOO GOOD, THEY HAVE 1000000000000000000000000000000% AURA, THEY ARE SIGMA WITH 10000000000000000000000000000000000% sigmas aura, LOVE THOSE GAME

this game is amazing. i've met plenty of people that like to play around with me and help me out whenever i need it. some people even helping me to the point where i got the content creator shirt and badge. the game has a very nice community and has amazing updates.

The game in general is enjoyable with anactive playerbase and a nice staff team. The community isn't toxic like other 
 you can make lots of friends. You have many activities that you can do in the game as well. And you can earn free cosmetics. You have about 10 Million shiny rox and can buy basically every cosmetic you like! I really recommend playing it and giving it a try.
this game gives you a long arms a lot of shinyrocks and the exact same gorilla tag update
